hero_sub: NavGuard provides secure blockchain-based identity verification and safety tools for tourists.

features_sub: Everything you need for safe and verified travel.
feat_secure_desc: Blockchain-based tourist identity verification that can't be tampered with.
feat_qr_desc: Hotels and authorities can verify users instantly with a quick scan.
feat_sos_desc: Emergency alert with camera, audio, and location evidence sent instantly.
feat_location_desc: Geofencing alerts when entering unsafe zones to keep you protected.
how_sub: Get protected in just four simple steps.
step1_desc: Create your NavGuard account in seconds.
step2_desc: Upload a government approved identity document.
step3_desc: System generates a secure blockchain ID and QR code.
step4_desc: Use QR verification and SOS protection anywhere.
auth_sub: Powerful tools for law enforcement and tourism departments.
auth_monitor_desc: Get real-time emergency alerts with precise location data.
auth_verify_desc: Instantly verify tourist identity via blockchain records.
auth_evidence_desc: Review camera, audio, and location evidence from SOS events.
auth_track_desc: Monitor and resolve safety incidents across your jurisdiction.
